HEY, I'M ANEETH

AND I'M  AN EDITOR A VIDEOGRAPHER A PHOTOGRAPHER A FILMMAKER? A DEVELOPER A CREATOR A STORYTELLER A PROBLEM SOLVER A DESIGNER STILL LEARNING. AN ARTIST AN EDITOR

toolkit

PROJECTS

WhisperLogger 2026

A native macOS menu-bar utility for rapid, distraction-free text logging.

TermLog 2026

A native terminal-based logging utility for macOS, designed for easy debugging and logging IO streams of multiple terminal tabs.

Gambler 2025

A multi-modal day-trading system that extracts real-time semantic data from news streams with a Transformer encoder, models price paths using Diffusion, and executes trades via a Deep Q-Network.

Aneeth Kumaar

Made with HTML, CSS and JS, and a lot of frenzy googling. Feel free to check out the source code of this project on my github profile. If you wish to reference or reuse it, I'll be honoured, but please do affiliate me.
